HOSP_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Hospital Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the hospital provider category; ever in the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HOSP_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: HOSP_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 =
